headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -78.9)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 50% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 149 quotes, driven by an exceptional 124 strong-intensity comments - people are expressing intense anger and annoyance today.

• At 69.3, frustration levels remain well above the typical range but cooled down from yesterday's peak of 89.7.

• Both fears and optimism stay suppressed below their historical averages, with optimism particularly weak at -26.6.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
